<!-- Ask your question here -->

## 🎯 Context
<!-- Provide context for your question -->

## 🔍 What I've Tried
<!-- Describe what you've already tried to solve this -->

## 📚 Resources Checked
<!-- List any documentation, tutorials, or resources you've already consulted -->

- [ ] Official documentation
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Contributing guidelines
- [ ] Existing GitHub issues
- [ ] Stack Overflow
- [ ] Community forums/discussions

## 🏷️ Question Type
<!-- Mark the relevant options with an 'x' -->

- [ ] 🚀 Installation/Setup question
- [ ] 💻 Usage/How-to question
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration question
- [ ] 🐛 Troubleshooting question
- [ ] 📚 Documentation question

- [ ] 🎨 Design/UI question
- [ ] ⚡ Performance question

## 🌐 Environment
<!-- Please complete the following information if relevant -->

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 20.18.0, 21.5.0]
- **Package Manager**: [e.g. pnpm 8.10.0, npm 10.0.0]
- **Chidori Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## 📎 Additional Information
<!-- Any additional information, screenshots, or files that might help answer your question -->

## ✅ Checklist
Please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have searched for existing questions that might answer mine
- [ ] I have checked the documentation for relevant information
- [ ] I have provided enough context for my question
- [ ] I have specified what I've already tried

---

### 💡 Tips for Getting Better Answers

1. **Be Specific**: The more specific your question, the better the answer
2. **Provide Context**: Include relevant code, error messages, and configuration
3. **Show Your Work**: Explain what you've already tried
4. **Format Code**: Use proper code blocks with syntax highlighting
5. **One Question**: Try to ask one main question per issue

### 🤝 Community Guidelines

- Be respectful and patient
- Help others when you can
- Share what you learn
- Follow the code of conduct

---

**Thank you for your question! We'll do our best to help you.**
